name: JoAi: Business Identity Verification

description.en: Submit your business information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.
description.de: Reiche deine Unternehmensdaten ein, um Auszahlungen freizuschalten. Einmalig pro Konto erforderlich.
description.es: Submit your business information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.
description.fr: Submit your business information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.
description.ro: Submit your business information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.
description.it: Submit your business information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.

bot: Guide the user through submitting their business identity for payout verification. Frame this as a business onboarding step — ask for the legal business name, the owner's name, registered country, business address, and VAT/tax ID. Explain this is required once to comply with legal obligations and unlock payouts.

description.en: Full legal name of the business owner or authorized representative.
description.de: Vollständiger rechtlicher Name des Geschäftsinhabers oder bevollmächtigten Vertreters.
description.es: Full legal name of the business owner or authorized representative.
description.fr: Full legal name of the business owner or authorized representative.
description.ro: Full legal name of the business owner or authorized representative.
description.it: Full legal name of the business owner or authorized representative.

inputs.name: Country

description.en: Country where the business is registered.
description.de: Land, in dem das Unternehmen registriert ist.
description.es: Country where the business is registered.
description.fr: Country where the business is registered.
description.ro: Country where the business is registered.
description.it: Country where the business is registered.

inputs.bot: Ask for the country naturally. Convert the answer to the two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. Austria → AT, Germany → DE) before submitting.

description.en: The registered business address including city and postal code.
description.de: Die eingetragene Geschäftsadresse mit Stadt und Postleitzahl.
description.es: The registered business address including city and postal code.
description.fr: The registered business address including city and postal code.
description.ro: The registered business address including city and postal code.
description.it: The registered business address including city and postal code.

description.en: The company's VAT number or tax identification number (e.g. ATU12345678, DE123456789).
description.de: Die UID-Nummer oder Steueridentifikationsnummer des Unternehmens (z.B. ATU12345678, DE123456789).
description.es: The company's VAT number or tax identification number (e.g. ATU12345678, DE123456789).
description.fr: The company's VAT number or tax identification number (e.g. ATU12345678, DE123456789).
description.ro: The company's VAT number or tax identification number (e.g. ATU12345678, DE123456789).
description.it: The company's VAT number or tax identification number (e.g. ATU12345678, DE123456789).

success.en: Business identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.
success.de: Unternehmensidentität eingereicht. Wir prüfen deine Angaben und benachrichtigen dich nach der Freigabe.
success.es: Business identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.
success.fr: Business identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.
success.ro: Business identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.
success.it: Business identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.

error.en: Failed to submit business information. Please try again.
error.de: Unternehmensdaten konnten nicht eingereicht werden. Bitte erneut versuchen.
error.es: Failed to submit business information. Please try again.
error.fr: Failed to submit business information. Please try again.
error.ro: Failed to submit business information. Please try again.
error.it: Failed to submit business information. Please try again.
